# Klima- og miljødepartementet

*26 lover*

| Lov | Korttittel | Ikrafttredelse | Historikk |
|-----|-----------|----------------|-----------|
| [Lov om Perlefiskeriet](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1845-06-07.md) | Lov om Perlefiskeriet |  | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1845-06-07.md) |
| [Lov om bevaring og bærekraftig bruk av marint naturmangfold i områder utenfor na](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-05-27-21.md) | Lov om bevaring og bærekraftig bruk av marint naturmangfold i områder utenfor nasjonal jurisdiksjon | 2026-01-17 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2025-05-27-21.md) |
| [Lov om bærekraftige produkter og verdikjeder (bærekraftige produkter-loven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2024-06-25-69.md) | Bærekraftige produkter-loven | 2024-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2024-06-25-69.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i klimakvoteloven](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2011-04-15-12.md) | Endringslov til klimakvoteloven | Kongen bestemmer, 2011-04-15, 2012-01-01, 2013-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2011-04-15-12.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i naturmangfoldloven (forbud mot næringsmessig uttak av myr)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-12-22-130.md) | Endringslov til naturmangfoldloven | 2026-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2025-12-22-130.md) |
| [Lov om fiskeretten i Tanavassdraget (Tanaloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2014-06-20-51.md) | Tanaloven | 2014-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2014-06-20-51.md) |
| [Lov om forskjellige forhold vedkommende Røros Kobberverks Skogvæsen](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1901-05-29-6.md) | Lov om Røros Kobberverks Skogvæsen | 1901-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1901-05-29-6.md) |
| [Lov om forvaltning av naturens mangfold (naturmangfoldloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2009-06-19-100.md) | Naturmangfoldloven – nml | 2009-07-01, 2011-02-01, 2012-07-01, 2016-01-01, Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2009-06-19-100.md) |
| [Lov om framstilling og bruk av genmodifiserte organismer m.m. (genteknologiloven](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1993-04-02-38.md) | Genteknologiloven – gentl | 1993-09-01, 1994-03-01, 1999-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1993-04-02-38.md) |
| [Lov om fredning og fangst av isbjørn [isbjørnloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1957-03-22-4.md) | Isbjørnloven | 1957-03-22 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1957-03-22-4.md) |
| [Lov om friluftslivet (friluftsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1957-06-28-16.md) | Friluftsloven – fril | 1957-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1957-06-28-16.md) |
| [Lov om gjennomføring i norsk rett av miljøvernkonvensjon mellom Norge, Danmark, ](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1976-04-09-21.md) | Lov om nordisk miljøvernkonvensjon | 1976-12-17 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1976-04-09-21.md) |
| [Lov om jakt og fangst av vilt (viltloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1981-05-29-38.md) | Viltloven – viltl | 1982-04-02 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1981-05-29-38.md) |
| [Lov om klimamål (klimaloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2017-06-16-60.md) | Klimaloven | 2018-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2017-06-16-60.md) |
| [Lov om kommunale vass- og avløpsanlegg (vass- og avløpsanleggslova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2012-03-16-12.md) | Vass- og avløpsanleggslova | 2012-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2012-03-16-12.md) |
| [Lov om kommunale vass- og avløpsanlegg (vass- og avløpsanleggslova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-06-26.md) | Vass- og avløpsanleggslova | 2026-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2025-06-06-26.md) |
| [Lov om kulturminner [kulturminneloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1978-06-09-50.md) | Kulturminneloven – kulml | 1979-02-15 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1978-06-09-50.md) |
| [Lov om kvoteplikt og handel med kvoter for utslipp av klimagasser (klimakvotelov](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2004-12-17-99.md) | Klimakvoteloven | 2005-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2004-12-17-99.md) |
| [Lov om laksefisk og innlandsfisk mv. (lakse- og innlandsfiskloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1992-05-15-47.md) | Lakse- og innlandsfiskloven – laksfl | 1993-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1992-05-15-47.md) |
| [Lov om miljøvern på Svalbard (svalbardmiljøloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2001-06-15-79.md) | Svalbardmiljøloven | 2002-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2001-06-15-79.md) |
| [Lov om motorferdsel i utmark og vassdrag (motorferdselloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1977-06-10-82.md) | Motorferdselloven | 1978-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1977-06-10-82.md) |
| [Lov om naturområder i Oslo og nærliggende kommuner (markaloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2009-06-05-35.md) | Markaloven | 2009-09-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2009-06-05-35.md) |
| [Lov om rett til miljøinformasjon og deltakelse i offentlige beslutningsprosesser](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2003-05-09-31.md) | Miljøinformasjonsloven – mlinfl | 2004-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2003-05-09-31.md) |
| [Lov om statlig naturoppsyn (naturoppsynsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1996-06-21-38.md) | Naturoppsynsloven | 1996-06-21 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1996-06-21-38.md) |
| [Lov om vern av marin natur utenfor territorialfarvannet (havvernloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-10-33.md) | Havvernloven | 2026-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2025-06-10-33.md) |
| [Lov om vern mot forurensninger og om avfall (forurensningsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1981-03-13-6.md) | Forurensningsloven – forurl | 1983-10-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1981-03-13-6.md) |
